summary: Email Open Rate Tracking (P2 Feature) - All 13 backend tests passed. Tracking pixel endpoint, open rate calculations in sequences dashboard, and existing endpoints all working correctly.
feature_tested: Email Open Rate Tracking P2 - Tracking pixel system for automated emails

tracking_pixel_endpoint.cache_control_header: PASS - Returns Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate
tracking_pixel_endpoint.no_auth_required: PASS - Endpoint is public (no auth needed)
tracking_pixel_endpoint.invalid_id_returns_pixel: PASS - Invalid/nonexistent trackingId still returns valid pixel (no 404)
tracking_pixel_endpoint.multiple_opens: PASS - Multiple opens to same tracking ID all succeed

sequences_dashboard.GET /api/sequences/dashboard: PASS - Returns real open rates per step
sequences_dashboard.averageOpenRate_in_stats: PASS - Each sequence has averageOpenRate in stats
sequences_dashboard.null_when_no_data: PASS - openRate is null when no tracking data exists

critical_code_review_comments: tracking.ts correctly implements 1x1 transparent PNG pixel with proper headers (Content-Type, Cache-Control, Expires)
tracking.ts correctly handles first open (sets opened=true, openedAt, openCount=1) vs subsequent opens (increments openCount only)
tracking.ts returns pixel even on errors to avoid broken images in emails
emailTracking.ts getOpenRate correctly returns null when no tracking data exists (sent=0)
emailTracking.ts getAverageOpenRate correctly calculates average of valid rates only
sequences.ts dashboard correctly integrates getOpenRate and getAverageOpenRate from emailTracking service
EmailTracking model in schema.prisma has proper indexes on trackingId, leadId, and composite [sequenceId, stepNumber]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Open Rate Tracking P2 feature complete. All tests passing. Key findings: (1) Tracking pixel endpoint at /api/track/open/:trackingId is public (no auth), always returns valid PNG even on errors, (2) Open rates are calculated from EmailTracking table and displayed in sequences dashboard, (3) averageOpenRate in stats is average of valid step rates only (excludes null), (4) Step openRate is null when no tracking data exists (sentCount=0 in EmailTracking for that sequenceId/stepNumber).
